displayTitle: Who's Making That Noise in The Millennium Falcon?!
synopsis: R2-D2 and BB-8 discover a mischievous Kowakian monkey-lizard making noise in the ship while Chewbacca's trying to sleep! Can they catch it before they wake Chewbacca and face his roar?
title: Who's Making That Noise in The Millennium Falcon?!
